Bat the village issued a total of 240 copper tokens, each valued at 3 pence, resulting in a total value of 240 * 3 = 720 pence. If the average purchase cost was 18 pence, then the number of average purchases that could be made with the total value of the tokens is 720 / 18 = 40 purchases. This calculation provides insight into the economic activity of the village and how the tokens were utilized in daily transactions.
